title: ctenitis trichorhachis
intro: Ctenitis trichorhachis, also known as the rattan fern or the Japanese varanus fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to East Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, and has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. The health benefits of Ctenitis trichorhachis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Ctenitis trichorhachis can be used in herbal preparations such as tea, tincture, and extract, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies and supplements.
